meta.title: About SGS | International Clean Energy Advisory
meta.description: About SGS: an international renewable energy consulting, project development, and sustainable infrastructure advisory firm.

hero.title: We help you plan clean energy and water projects.
hero.text: Since 2015, we have supported teams across MENA with practical guidance, trusted partners, and clear next steps.

intro.title: We are your hands-on advisory team.
intro.text: We combine strategy, project planning, and technical coordination. Our role is to help you align people, partners, and delivery so your project moves forward with confidence.

pillars.title: Help you move clean infrastructure from idea to action.
Grow renewable energy and resilient utility systems across priority markets.
Work with us through open collaboration, trust, and practical partnerships.

market_focus.title: We focus on GCC and MENA with global support.
market_focus.text: We support local delivery while connecting you with international suppliers and specialists. This gives your team stronger options and clearer delivery paths.

cards.title: Renewable energy leads
cards.text: Solar and clean infrastructure are at the center of our work.

cards.title: Advisory mindset
cards.text: We help you shape projects, partnerships, and delivery pathways.

cards.title: Technical credibility
cards.text: Our core strengths include water, desalination, wastewater, and EPC coordination.

cards.title: Long-term thinking
cards.text: We stay with you through execution, operations, and long-term continuity.

cta.title: Work with us on your next renewable infrastructure decision.
